reasoning: The market was priced at 20% in late July 2025. Manifold launched 'sweepstakes' using 'Sweepcash' in September 2024, but this model is legally formulated as non-gambling (as 'no purchase necessary' sweepstakes), which is likely why it hasn't resolved this market to YES (the criteria specifically stipulate 'legally gamble'). For the market to resolve YES, Manifold would need to launch a separate affiliated platform for actual crypto/real-money gambling (like getting a CFTC license or an offshore gambling license) before the end of 2025. Given that they are already successfully operating the sweepstakes model and Polymarket dominates the crypto space, a pivot to true real-money gambling in the next 5 months seems unlikely and would require significant legal/regulatory groundwork that hasn't been announced. I am forecasting slightly below the July market price (18%) to account for the passage of time without any new announcements.
